title: Labor Jobs Posting Drop Coupled With Google Trends Search For Job Layoffs
thesis: A simultaneous decline in job postings and spike in layoff-related searches signals deteriorating labor demand. Financial sector often reacts negatively to weakening labor markets due to credit risk concerns.
data_sources: Google Trends weekly search interest for layoffs; job board postings data
signal_logic: If weekly job postings drop 10% and layoff search volume rises 20% vs prior week
entry_exit: Entry: If weekly job postings drop 10% and layoff search volume rises 20% vs prior week Exit: When either metric reverses by 10%
position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
implementation_notes: Use Google Trends weekly search interest for layoffs; job board postings data via api (weekly).
reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Labor market fluctuations and layoff news frequently occur with weekly cadence.

schema.idea: Labor jobs posting drop coupled with Google Trends search for job layoffs

data.source: Google Trends weekly search interest for layoffs; job board postings data

schema.behavior: A simultaneous decline in job postings and spike in layoff-related searches signals deteriorating labor demand.

market_impact.rationale: Financial sector often reacts negatively to weakening labor markets due to credit risk concerns.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly job postings drop 10% and layoff search volume rises 20% vs prior week

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Labor market fluctuations and layoff news frequently occur with weekly cadence.

title: Consumer Stress Spike From Google Trends On Urgent Appliance Repair Searches
thesis: Increased searches for urgent appliance repair indicate rising household distress impacting discretionary spending. Consumer discretionary spending tends to decline when stress and urgent repair needs rise.
data_sources: Google Trends weekly search interest for appliance repair
signal_logic: If weekly search volume rises 25% above 4-week moving average
entry_exit: Entry: If weekly search volume rises 25% above 4-week moving average Exit: When search volume returns below 10% above moving average
position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
implementation_notes: Use Google Trends weekly search interest for appliance repair via api (weekly).
reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Appliance issues spike seasonally and with weather changes, causing frequent search surges.

schema.idea: Consumer stress spike from Google Trends on urgent appliance repair searches

data.source: Google Trends weekly search interest for appliance repair

schema.behavior: Increased searches for urgent appliance repair indicate rising household distress impacting discretionary spending.

market_impact.rationale: Consumer discretionary spending tends to decline when stress and urgent repair needs rise.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly search volume rises 25% above 4-week moving average
trade_logic.exit: When search volume returns below 10% above moving average

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Appliance issues spike seasonally and with weather changes, causing frequent search surges.

title: Weekly Jump In Political Insider Filings For Technology Sector Executives Selling Shares
thesis: An unusual increase in insider sales by tech executives signals potential upcoming weakness or valuation concern. Insider selling often precedes short-term sector pullbacks or increased volatility.
data_sources: SEC insider filing API for technology sector
signal_logic: If weekly insider sales volume exceeds 2 standard deviations above 12-week average
entry_exit: Entry: If weekly insider sales volume exceeds 2 standard deviations above 12-week average Exit: After 4 weeks or sales volume normalizes
position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
implementation_notes: Use SEC insider filing API for technology sector via api (weekly).
reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Regular insider sales reports and clustered executive sales happen frequently.

title: Weekly Rise In Macro Input Pressure Fred Producer Price Index Spike Signals Inflation Stress

position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
implementation_notes: Use FRED PPI monthly data via api (weekly).
reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: PPI data updates regularly with inflation dynamics causing repeat signals.
